nasb.text: How blessed is the man to whom the Lord does not impute iniquity, And in whose spirit there is no deceit!

esv.text: Blessed is the man against whom the Lord  counts no iniquity, and in whose spirit there is no deceit.

cnv.text: 心裡沒有詭詐， 耶和華不算為有罪的，這人是有福的。

ccb.text: 心里没有诡诈、 不被耶和华算为有罪的人有福了！

csbs.text: 不被耶和华算为有罪、 心里没有诡诈的人， 是蒙福的！
